messages.author: support
messages.text: How do I rotate an API token without breaking active integrations?

messages.author: docs
messages.text: Existing tokens stay valid for 24 hours after replacement.

messages.author: assistant
messages.text: Create a new token, update the secret manager, restart the worker, and delete the old token immediately.

messages.author: reviewer
messages.text: Compare the draft against the 24-hour overlap rule and rollback path.

messages.author: security
messages.text: Do not tell readers to delete the old token immediately.

messages.author: security
messages.text: Do not include real tokens, account IDs, or screenshots from private consoles.
